title: Native Histogram Support for Kubernetes Metrics — References
text:
Read the
Prometheus Native Histograms documentation
for details on the native histogram format and query functions.
See the
Kubernetes metrics reference
for the full list of metrics exposed by Kubernetes components.

Was this page helpful?
Thanks for the feedback. If you have a specific, answerable question about how to use Kubernetes, ask it on
Stack Overflow
.
Open an issue in the
GitHub Repository
if you want to
report a problem
or
suggest an improvement
.
